mapper.select: /* 데이터마트 목록 조회 datamart.selectDatamartList */ SELECT A.DATAMART_ID , A.DM_NM , A.DESCRIPTION , A.DB_TYPE , A.DB_VERSION , A.HOST , A.PORT , A.DB_NM , A.USERNAME , A.PWD_ENC , A.SCH_NM , A.CONN_OPT , A.READONLY_YN , A.IP_WLIST_YN , A.SSL_YN , A.TBL_CNT , A.LAST_VERIFY_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DM A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD

/* 데이터마트 단건 조회 datamart.selectDatamart */ SELECT A.DATAMART_ID , A.DM_NM , A.DB_TYPE , A.DB_VERSION , A.HOST , A.PORT , A.DB_NM , A.USERNAME , A.PWD_ENC , A.SCH_NM , A.CONN_OPT FROM TB_DM A WHERE A.DATAMART_ID = #{datamartId}

/* 메타 테이블 목록 조회 시 저장된 컬럼 메타 로드 datamart.selectDmColListByDatamartAndTbl */ SELECT A.COL_ID AS colId , A.COL_PHY_NM AS colPhyNm , A.COL_KOR_NM AS colKorNm , A.COL_DESC AS colDesc , A.DATA_TYPE AS dataType , CAST(A.DATA_LEN AS CHAR) AS dataLen , A.PK_YN AS pkYn , A.FK_YN AS fkYn , A.NULLABLE_YN AS nullableYn , A.HAS_CODE_YN AS hasCodeYn , A.AI_HINT AS aiHint , A.SORT_ORD AS sortOrd , A.USE_YN AS useYn , DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt , DATE_FORMAT(A.MODIFY_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM TB_DM_COL A WHERE A.DATAMART_ID = #{datamartId} AND A.TBL_ID = #{tblId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.COL_PHY_NM

/* 데이터마트 요약 정보 조회 datamart.selectDatamartSummary */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT , SUM(CASE WHEN A.USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACTIVE_COUNT , SUM(CASE WHEN A.USE_YN <> 'Y' OR A.USE_YN IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INACTIVE_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(A.TBL_CNT), 0) AS DATA_SOURCE_COUNT , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(MAX(A.LAST_VERIFY_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS LAST_SCAN_DATE , COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.DB_TYPE ORDER BY A.DB_TYPE SEPARATOR ', '), '') AS CONNECTED_SYSTEMS FROM TB_DM A
